descriptionEn: Name possibly means "branch." He is the son of Reu, father of Nahor, and great grandfather of Abraham. He lived 230 years. Also "Saruch" (Luke 3:35).
articleEn: Son of Reu, and father of Nahor in the ancestral line of Abraham (Gen 11:20—23 1 Chr 1:26 Lk 3:35). The city of Sarugi near Haran is believed to have been named after him.

verses.line: And Reu lived two and thirty years, and begat Serug:
And Serug lived after he begat Nahor two hundred years, and begat sons and daughters.

images.caption: Serug son of Reu. Published: Guillaume Rouille, Source:  "Promptuarii Iconum Insigniorum ", c. 1553
